description: This pair of red lace-up shoes from the Mustang range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and inkfruit tees and create a stir wherever you go.Uppers Red canvas uppers with mock black and white inner panel and black lining gives great protection and great style White lace-ups ensures a snug Fit Embroidered logo on the side Lightly cushioned insole gives greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Diagonal grooves on outsole ensures greater grip and stability fila branding on the arch Toe guard for greater protection Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
